caption: A man wearing a grey wig, glasses, a white button-down shirt with suspenders, and a small bow tie is seated in a studio environment. He wears black headphones and is positioned in front of a black professional microphone. The background consists of a wall covered in numerous small framed photographs and a clothing rack featuring shirts, including one with the text "LEE". On the left and right sides of the screen, logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" are visible, with the latter including the tagline "It's aConversation". Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing, his facial expression shifting from a neutral look to a slight frown as he looks toward the left of the frame. He remains in the same seated position throughout the clip, while the camera angle remains steady.
